steps.title: Spot the command
steps.content: Lady Britomart commands Stephen: "You must assume the responsibility." The context reveals the target meaning: to take on or accept a duty.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The word "assume" needs to mean taking on a duty or responsibility. Substitute each choice:
  • "Infer": you must infer the responsibility — infer means to draw a conclusion from evidence; Lady Britomart is assigning a task, not asking Stephen to deduce something. ✗
  • "Mimic": you must mimic the responsibility — mimic means to imitate; responsibility is something you carry, not something you copy. ✗
  • "Undertake": you must undertake the responsibility — undertake means to take on or commit to a task, matching Lady Britomart's direct command to Stephen to accept family duties. ✓
  • "Presuppose": you must presuppose the responsibility — presuppose means to take something for granted as a premise; Lady Britomart wants Stephen to act, not to make an intellectual assumption. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
